title: Prosecution
description: Aggregate prosecution / caseload statistics for the Manhattan District Attorney's Office — arraignments, indictments, dispositions, convictions, declinations, and diversions summarized by reporting period, bureau, and crime category. This is the office's core operational subject, yet it has NO machine-readable surface: there is NO NYC Open Data twin and no structured API, only prose in press releases and periodic reports. Published AGGREGATE only; the office never exposes an individual case or defendant record. Design-first schema.

x-source.note: No NYC Open Data agency label exists for the Manhattan DA; caseload data lives only inside the office's case management system (Odyssey/Ada) and its published reports as prose.

diversions.description: Cases routed to diversion / alternative-to-incarceration programs.
